message: refactor: curate top 30 testimonials for carousel

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,33 @@
 [
   {
-    "quote": "Not enterprise. Not hosted. Infrastructure you control. This is what personal AI should feel like.",
-    "author": "BioInfo",
-    "url": "https://x.com/BioInfo/status/2010115166315393370"
+    "quote": "Remember when Siri was supposed to be the future? That future exists now - it's just not from Apple or Google. Self-hosted AI that actually remembers things, messages proactively, runs 24/7 on a $5/month server.",
+    "author": "velvet_shark",
+    "url": "https://x.com/velvet_shark/status/2009716334813434019"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Within an hour, had it monitoring my full release workflow—gh actions, npm publish—alerting me when done!",
+    "author": "shuv1337",
+    "url": "https://x.com/shuv1337/status/2008118863205113899"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Knew my voice, my weird abbreviations, my 2am panic debugging sessions. Made me feel like a real developer.",
+    "author": "xMikeMickelson",
+    "url": "https://x.com/xMikeMickelson/status/2009511137537126548"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Too lazy to search. Asked @clawdbot to search emails for me, he goes through email, finds pdf, gives me numbers. Good bot.",
+    "author": "jjpcodes",
+    "url": "https://x.com/jjpcodes/status/2010026119446310928"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "Feels like the best buddy you always wanted. For me this is 'alpha AGI'.",
+    "author": "OliNorwell",
+    "url": "https://x.com/OliNorwell/status/2009205888482210149"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "This mf called @steipete has achieved AGI with @clawdbot",
+    "author": "rmedranollamas",
+    "url": "https://x.com/rmedranollamas/status/2008649596474716515"
   },
   {
     "quote": "Perma on MacMini loaded with @clawdbot is the alpha isn't it. For a relatively small amount of $$ we can have an insanely capable always-on AI assistant. Feels like cheating.",
